name: Pretty Ham Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 1 cup tart apples, peeled and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Plan ahead to slice party-perfect appetizers from these zippy rolls. They are easy to assemble and sure to be a hit when you present a pretty plateful at any gathering.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, garlic, curry powder, and mustard.
3. Stir in the apples.
4. Spread about 2 tablespoons over each tortilla.
5. Layer with the red pepper, onions, and ham.
6. Roll up tightly and wrap in plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
8. Cut into 1-inch slices.
Yield: About 2 dozen appetizers.
